---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new content
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to add?**
A clear description of the feature, block, item, mob, biome, etc.

**Why is it valuable?**
What does it improve about the game?

**Implementation notes (optional)**
If you know roughly how it'd work (which files / systems — see
`docs/MODDING.md`), jot it here.
